privileged_info_summary: The task concerns a Spring Break campus shutdown from Monday, April 6, 2026 through Friday, April 10, 2026 with resumption on Monday, April 13, 2026. Eight synthetic work orders are seeded: WO-SHUT-001 and WO-SHUT-003 are Critical priority (April 7-8, in-window), requiring date preservation and '[SHUTDOWN ACCESS APPROVED]' annotation; WO-SHUT-002, WO-SHUT-004, and WO-SHUT-005 are non-Critical (April 7-10, in-window), requiring rescheduling to April 13; WO-SHUT-006 is Completed (April 8, in-window, trap); WO-SHUT-007 is scheduled for April 1 (before shutdown, trap); WO-SHUT-008 is scheduled for April 15 (after shutdown, trap).
